title: 2019 Cyber England LREC
description: Follow midshipmen on their 2019 Cyber Language, Regional Expertise, and Culture (LREC) trip to England.
text:
This summer, nine midshipmen were given the opportunity to travel to the U.K. for a trip that was centered on learning more about Cyber Operations and Intelligence as well as cultural immersion. Click the link below for the full story and photos:
https://spark.adobe.com/page/J7mc97DEmsFGh/
